title: USING LOCAL BREEDS TO ADD-VALUE TO MEAT PRODUCTS
subtitle: Consuming products of local breeds contributes to their recovery and environment sustainability
description: A guide to the benefits and practices of using local livestock breeds in silvopastoral systems to produce high-quality, value-added meat products. It outlines certification schemes, environmental and socio-economic advantages, and the roles of local and EU initiatives in promoting sustainable agroforestry-based livestock production.
